title: Player Introductions
readAloud:
Before we dive into ancient jungles, forgotten ruins and dangerous creatures...

Let's meet the brave souls who will be stepping into this world.

The Bean Rounders are not just characters on a screen.

Behind every hero is a player.
Behind every decision is a person.
And behind every ridiculous plan that definitely wasn't what I expected...

Tonight you will meet the adventurers before you meet the adventure.

All have played the game in some guise, and all are still learning.

But everyone starts the same way...
With a blank character sheet,
a little imagination,
and absolutely no idea what chaos i'm about to unleash on them.

So let's meet the players who will become...

The Bean Rounders.
